title: plinia acutissima var. cidrensis
intro: Plinia acutissima var. cidrensis, also known as the Brazilian guava or yellow guava, is a variety of the Plinia acutissima plant, a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine in Brazil due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Plinia acutissima var. cidrensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and help manage various respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
